'''Rancor Base''', also known as the '''Dathomir Shipyards''', was [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s secret [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] in orbit over [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].

==Description==
Rancor Base was a [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] located in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the planet [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].<ref name="GatORW" /> It was made of huge drydocks of scaffolding that stretched over ten kilometers. In addition to its shipbuilding capacities, the facility also provided repair and maintenance services to Zsinj's fleet.<ref name="CTD">''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''</ref>

The Dathomir Shipyards was also used for development and testing of new weapons of war. It was there that Zsinj's engineers developed the [[TIE/rpt starfighter|TIE Raptor]], which was used by the warlord's [[Raptors]].<ref name="CTD" />

The facility was defended by a number of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]].<ref name="CTD" />

==History==
The construction of an orbital facility above [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] was an idea originally developed by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in the context of the [[blockade of Dathomir]].<ref name="BoS:SftDS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>

After the death of the Emperor at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Zsinj]] became a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] and created his own [[Zsinj's Empire|empire]] in the [[Quelii Oversector]].<ref name="Despoilers">{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-1|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}}</ref> When large deposits of [[Neutronium/Legends|neutronium]], [[Lommite/Legends|lommite]] and [[Zersium/Legends|zersium]], the minerals used in making [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]], were discovered on Dathomir's moon of [[Koratas]], Zsinj quickly ordered the construction of Dathomir Shipyards. All Zsinj's shipbuilding facilities were then moved to the [[Dathomir system/Legends|Dathomir system]] but the existence of Rancor Base remained hidden to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="CTD" />

After the [[Battle of Selaggis]], Zsinj's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']], was sent for repairs at the Dathomir shipyards.<ref name="CTD" />

The base and its shipyard were destroyed in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] by a battle [[Hapan Royal Navy|fleet]] sent to Dathomir by [[Ta'a Chume]], the ruler of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]], in an effort to rescue her son [[Isolder]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. Zsinj was killed during the [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|battle]] when the ''Iron Fist'' was destroyed.<ref name="TCoPL">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>
